articles.title: Global Market Today: Asian stocks turn cautious as reality intrudes in Gulf

Inflationary pressures are expected to persist, influencing central bank decisions on interest rates.

articles.title: Global relief wave lifts Indian markets, but FIIs stay cautious
articles.description: Indian equity indices surged significantly on Wednesday, with the Sensex and Nifty experiencing their strongest single-day gains in years. This rally was fueled by relief over a US-Iran ceasefire, leading to a drop in oil prices and easing inflation concerns. The market capitalization of BSE-listed companies increased by ₹16.1 lakh crore.

articles.title: Ceasefire calm sparks bargain hunting in beaten-down stocks
articles.description: Following a US-Iran ceasefire, bargain hunters are cautiously investing in stocks heavily impacted by the West Asia sell-off. Sectors like aviation, travel, and oil marketing companies saw sharp rebounds, though analysts debate the sustainability of this recovery. Stronger investor interest is noted in quality large-cap stocks in banking, pharmaceuticals, and FMCG, which were less directly affected by the conflict.

articles.description: Gold and silver prices rose sharply as Middle East tensions eased, boosting global market sentiment and reducing US dollar and crude oil prices.

dailyNews.title: US Iran War Live: Trump reiterates his frustration, says ‘NATO won't be there if we need them again’
dailyNews.description: US Iran War Live Updates: US President Donald Trump sharply criticized NATO and appeared to revive his threats regarding Greenland after a private meeting with alliance chief Mark Rutte.

dailyNews.title: 'Netanyahu's contempt for international law intolerable,' says Spanish PM Sanchez amid Lebanon attacks
dailyNews.description: Pedro Sanchez said that Benjamin Netanyahu's ‘contempt for life and international law is intolerable,’ and demanded that Lebanon be included in the ceasefire deal between the US and Iran. He also urged the international community to condemn the violation of international law by the Israeli PM.

dailyNews.title: Ceasefire calm sparks bargain hunting in beaten-down stocks
dailyNews.description: Following a US-Iran ceasefire, bargain hunters are cautiously investing in stocks heavily impacted by the West Asia sell-off. Sectors like aviation, travel, and oil marketing companies saw sharp rebounds, though analysts debate the sustainability of this recovery. Stronger investor interest is noted in quality large-cap stocks in banking, pharmaceuticals, and FMCG, which were less directly affected by the conflict.

dailyNews.title: ‘Big, poorly run, piece of ice’: Trump invokes Greenland as he mulls punishing NATO over lack of Iran war support
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump is weighing punishing NATO allies over the Iran war. He is mulling troop withdrawals from Spain and Germany and is invoking Greenland in a fresh assault on the transatlantic alliance.

dailyNews.title: Investors not quite sure markets have passed the Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Markets are cautiously optimistic after a US-Iran ceasefire. Investors are watching fourth-quarter earnings and crude oil prices closely. Foreign institutional investors' decisions will also shape market direction. While immediate conflict fears fade, domestic concerns like valuations and growth recovery may resurface. Corporate profitability faces pressure from higher energy costs and a weaker rupee.

dailyNews.title: Iran war live: Lebanon mourns as Israel raids shake Trump, Tehran ceasefire
dailyNews.description: UN human rights chief Volker Turk describes Israel's attacks on Lebanon as 'horrific' coming so soon after ceasefire.

dailyNews.title: ‘Israel must be restrained for US-Iran ceasefire to hold’
dailyNews.description: Former US counterterrorism chief Joe Kent had warned Israel could ‘sabotage’ the US-Iran ceasefire.

dailyNews.title: Prosecutors seek Tiger Woods' prescription drug records after Florida arrest
dailyNews.description: A legal order seeking the golfer's medications - including dosage and warnings about driving on pill bottles - will be issued later this month, court record shows.

dailyNews.title: Kharge expresses regret over ‘illiterate’ remark, says he respects people of Gujarat
dailyNews.description: Congress leader Mallikarjun Kharge apologises for calling Gujaratis ‘illiterate’, reaffirming his respect for the State’s people

dailyNews.title: Man charged after allegedly threatening to kill Ohio dad 'in the name of Allah' in terrifying video encounter
dailyNews.description: Anthony Long allegedly told an Ohio father he would kill him "in the name of Allah" in a terrifying encounter caught on camera.

dailyNews.title: Dem lawmaker calls for TSA to bring back shoes-off airport security policy
dailyNews.description: Sen. Tammy Duckworth is calling on the TSA to bring back its controversial policy requiring travelers to remove their shoes before going through security checkpoints at airports.

dailyNews.description: Courtney Williams is accused of leaking top-secret military tactics to an investigative journalist, according to a federal complaint.

dailyNews.title: Stocks rally and oil prices drop following ceasefire announcement
dailyNews.description: Stocks jumped and oil prices fell on Wednesday following President Trump's announcement of a two-week ceasefire in the war with Iran. CBS News senior business and tech correspondent Jo Ling Kent has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump Finds Himself With Fragile Iran Cease-Fire After the Scramble to Make a Deal
dailyNews.description: After careening from one diplomatic extreme to another, President Trump finds himself with a fragile deal that is already showing signs of fraying.

dailyNews.title: White House Knew About Pakistan’s Cease-Fire Post on X Before It Was Sent
dailyNews.description: Pakistan’s prime minister posted a public plea on X for President Trump to extend his Tuesday evening deadline for Iran. The White House was directly involved in shaping the message.

dailyNews.title: White House Secures Foreign Steel for Trump’s Ballroom Project
dailyNews.description: ArcelorMittal, a European steel maker, is donating tens of millions of dollars of foreign steel for President Trump’s new ballroom.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Investigating L.A. Schools’ Gender Disclosure Policies
dailyNews.description: The investigation into the nation’s second-largest school district was prompted by a lawsuit from parents who say the policies contributed to their child’s death.

dailyNews.title: On Truth Social, Trump Supporters Fume About Iran War
dailyNews.description: A growing chorus of disaffected Trump supporters is sounding off in the replies to his posts on the social media platform he founded.

dailyNews.title: 'Poorly run, piece of ice': Trump targets Greenland again as Iran war deepens NATO rift
dailyNews.description: Trump has set his eyes on Greenland again while venting frustration at NATO, as the diplomatic fallout from Iran war exposed rifts in the security alliance.

dailyNews.title: Trump wants Strait of Hormuz open 'without limitation, including tolls' during Iran ceasefire: White House
dailyNews.description: Iran is reportedly planning to demand that shipping firms pay tolls in cryptocurrency to let their oil tankers through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Rep. Ritchie Torres calls for probe into futures trades placed ahead of March pause on Iran hostilities
dailyNews.description: Oil and energy futures trading before President Donald Trump announced a pause in Iran attacks in March raises insider trading concerns, Torres told regulators.

dailyNews.title: Ceasefire between Iran and the U.S. fragile amid continued strikes
dailyNews.description: With a fragile ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran in place, Israel launched its biggest attacks yet against Iran-backed Hezbollah in Lebanon. Iran says Lebanon is part of the ceasefire, while the U.S. and Israel say it is not. The White House announced Vice President J.D. Vance will travel to Pakistan for negotiations with Iran. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

dailyNews.title: Oil plunges on Iran ceasefire news, setting the stage for some relief on gas prices
dailyNews.description: Stocks roared higher after President Trump announced a two-week ceasefire with Iran. Oil prices fell sharply, and gas prices are expected to follow.

dailyNews.title: Strikes on Lebanon test U.S.-Israeli relations
dailyNews.description: Israeli strikes on Lebanon have reportedly stalled the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. NBC News' Matt Bradley joins "Here's the Scoop" to explain how this delay could strain the relationship between President Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.

dailyNews.title: White House defends Trump's 'very tough rhetoric' on Iran
dailyNews.description: NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez questions White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt about President Trump’s Truth Social post threatening to wipe out “a whole civilization” on Tuesday.
